    O

    Order - Class in lt.viko.eif.tsaviscevas.first.spring.model
    Represents a restaurant order containing menu items.
    Order() - Constructor for class lt.viko.eif.tsaviscevas.first.spring.model.Order
    Default constructor required for JAXB.
    Order(int, List) - Constructor for class lt.viko.eif.tsaviscevas.first.spring.model.Order
    Creates an order with ID and menu items.
